sotapatti.name: Sotāpatti-magga
sotapatti.subtitle: Beginner — for those building the chain
sotapatti.description: For those new to practice, or returning after a long absence. The first task is to make a single thread unbroken — to sit every day, even briefly, until missing a day feels strange. The Shadow grows slowly here. Wisdom drops more often. Mara has not yet noticed you.

sakadagami.name: Sakadāgāmi-magga
sakadagami.subtitle: Intermediate — for established sitters
sakadagami.description: For those with an existing daily practice. Sensual desire and ill will weaken at this stage but are not gone. Two sits a day become possible. The Shadow grows at standard pace. Mara begins to take you seriously.

anagami.name: Anāgāmi-magga
anagami.subtitle: Dedicated — for serious practitioners
anagami.description: For those whose practice is already woven into the day. The five lower fetters are weakening. The subtle defilements — restlessness, conceit, residual craving — become the real work. Mara brings his full force.

arahant.name: Arahant-magga
arahant.english: The Path of the Worthy One
arahant.subtitle: Highest level — practice already woven into life
arahant.description: For practitioners who already sit two hours a day. All ten fetters are the work. Māra appears in full force and the subtle defilements — conceit, restlessness about subtle things, the last traces of craving for becoming — become the real battleground. Expect the path to become harder as it deepens, not easier. This is honorable.

custom.name: Your Own Path
custom.subtitle: Set your own duration and pace
custom.description: You define everything: minutes, habits, Shadow strictness. For those who already know what they need. The honest choice when no template fits.
